metadata.description: DNA — Domain Notation of Anything. Declarative, typed notation for agentic behavior. Plugin distribution surface for Claude Code, plus a curated set of recommended ecosystem skills (see RECOMMENDED-SKILLS.md).

plugins.name: dna
plugins.description: The dna-sdlc-cli skill — story-first, in-repo SDLC tracking via the `dna sdlc` CLI (AC/DoD guard, plan gate, narration, test gate, Work-Item git trailers, story pr, digest + gallery).

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Core engineering skills the DNA SDLC leans on — TDD, systematic debugging, brainstorming, writing/executing plans, code review, git worktrees. Referenced, not vendored.

plugins.name: impeccable
plugins.description: Frontend design fluency — UX critique, visual hierarchy, typography, motion, anti-pattern detection. Pairs with `dna sdlc gallery` when authoring the HtmlArtifacts you review. Referenced, not vendored.
